<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Subscribers; use Pest\Mutate\Event\Events\TestSuite\FinishMutationSuite; use Pest\Mutate\Event\Events\TestSuite\FinishMutationSuiteSubscriber; /** * @internal */ final class TrackMutationSuiteFinish implements FinishMutationSuiteSubscriber { public function notify(FinishMutationSuite $event): void { $event->mutationSuite->trackFinish(); } }
